name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: At 4025 Broadway Blvd in Garland, TX, First Cash Pawn offers quick cash loans on jewelry, electronics, and valuables.
description_long:
Located at 4025 Broadway Blvd in Garland, TX, First Cash Pawn is a standalone pawn shop offering immediate cash loans. The Garland location is open Monday through Saturday from 10 AM to 7 PM, making it convenient for area residents seeking quick pawn services. This Texas shop provides a welcoming environment for anyone needing to convert valuables into fast cash.

The Garland pawn shop specializes in short-term loans secured by jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, tools, and other valuables. Customers can contact the location at +1 972-303-3190 to discuss items, check rates, or ask about the loan process. Professional staff members can typically complete transactions the same day, giving borrowers fast access to funds without credit checks.

Bring valid identification and your item when you visit the Garland, TX location to streamline the appraisal process. First Cash Pawn handles standard pawn transactions professionally and quickly, allowing you to decide on the loan terms that work best for your situation. Many Garland residents rely on this shop for emergency cash needs without the delays or credit requirements of traditional lending.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America providing convenient access
Non-recourse pawn loans require no credit check or income verification
Immediate same-day cash available upon item evaluation
No debt obligation if pawned item isn't redeemed—you lose collateral but don't owe money
Buys and sells diverse merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances)
Gold and precious metal buying service for instant cash conversion
Layaway service available with 10% down payment option for retail purchases
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) indicating stability and regulatory oversight
cons: Pawn loans carry risk of losing pledged personal property if loan cannot be repaid
Website does not disclose interest rates, fees, or loan terms—consumers must visit store for pricing
Not a substitute for traditional credit; does not help build credit history or improve credit score
Loan amounts are limited by the resale value of pledged items, not borrower's actual financial capacity
Retail inventory varies by location and availability is not guaranteed, limiting merchandise purchasing options
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history who need quick cash without credit evaluation
Individuals with valuable personal property (electronics, jewelry, instruments) they can temporarily pledge
People seeking short-term emergency funds who prefer not taking on debt obligations
Budget-conscious shoppers looking for discounted used electronics, tools, or jewelry
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for individuals with poor or no credit who need immediate cash and have valuable personal property to pledge as collateral. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical assets—if you cannot repay, you lose your collateral—and the website provides no pricing transparency on interest rates or fees, making it essential to visit a location to understand actual loan costs before committing.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property pledges
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying and evaluation
Retail sales of pawned merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods)
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
Store locator tool for finding nearby locations
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary
Technology-driven point-of-sale payment solutions (through AFF subsidiary)
Consumer lending focused on cash-constrained populations
Retail payment financing across 15,000+ merchant partner locations
meta_description: First Cash Pawn at 4025 Broadway Blvd, Garland, TX. Quick pawn loans on jewelry and electronics with same-day service.
